description:
A futsal management game with a 2D match engine and integrated editor.
99Managers is a sports management game, and this is the Futsal Edition, the first in the series.

Run real futsal matches with a real-time 2D match engine and take full control with the in-game editor. Customize players, teams, and competitions. And since it’s open source, you can get the full source code and make it yours.

2D match engine
- Watch full matches or just the highlights
- Influence outcomes by changing players and tactics
- Simulate matches and get final results instantly

Data pack editor
- Create custom data packs and share them with others
- Customize competitions, and build your own leagues and cups
- Create teams, use logos, and edit player attributes

Join the community
- Because your feedback matters
- Report bugs
- Improve translations
- Contribute fixes and features

Made with Godot Engine 4 and much love.
